expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜所需的板材尺寸。 [宽度], [高度], [深度] 是总测量值， [板材厚度] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度， [背板厚度] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดของไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นขนาดรวมทั้งหมด [BoardThick] คือความหนาของไม้ ด้านบน ล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของไม้ด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước tấm ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng cộng, [BoardThick] là độ dày nguyên liệu của các tấm Ván Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày nguyên liệu của tấm Ván Lưng. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinukuwenta ang mga sukat ng board para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Sukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Tuktok, Ibaba, at Gilid na Board, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Likurang Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: သေတ္တာတွေအတွက် ဘုတ်ပြားအရွယ်အစားတွေတွက်ချက်ပေးတယ်။ [အနံ့], [အမြင့်], [အနက်] က စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်ပြီး [ဘုတ်ကွင်းအထူ]ကို မျက်နှာပြင်အပေါ်ပိုင်း၊ အောက်ပိုင်းနဲ့ ဘေးဘုတ်ပြားပစ္စည်းအထူ၊ [နောက်ဘုတ်ပြားအထူ]ကို နောက်ခံဘုတ်ပြားပစ္စည်းအထူ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាទំហំក្តារសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width]​ [Height]​ [Depth] ជាចំណុចសរុប​ [BoardThick] ជាកម្រាស់ឧបករណ៍ធ្វើក្តារ ហើយ [BackBoardThick] ថ្មគួរតែធំនឹងស្ល. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະໜາດຂອງຄອງໄມ້ສໍາລັບຕູ້ໃສຂອງ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ສ່ຽວໜ້າ [BoardThick]ໝາຍເຊັ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດຖູສີນຂອງໄມ້ (ຂ້າ) [BackBoardThick]ຄືວັດຕີຄວາມໜາໃນໂຄງ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネット用の板のサイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] は全体の寸法、[BoardThick] は上部、下部、サイドボードの素材の厚さ、[BackBoardThick] は背面ボードの素材の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛에 필요한 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 측정값이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드의 재질 두께, [BackBoardThick]는 후면 보드의 재질 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de los tableros para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son las medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de los tableros superior, inferior y laterales, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero trasero. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les tailles des panneaux pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des panneaux supérieur, inférieur et latéraux, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau du panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtabmessungen, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: एक कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड का आकार गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड की सामग्री मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड की सामग्री मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] - это общие размеры, [BoardThick] - толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковых досок, [BackBoardThick] - толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
